greetings.meaning: A friendly word to say when you see someone
greetings.example: Hello, my name is Emma. What is your name?
greetings.kid_friendly_explanation: Say 'hello' when you want to be friendly to someone.

greetings.meaning: A greeting used in the morning
greetings.example: Good morning, Mom! Did you sleep well?
greetings.kid_friendly_explanation: Say 'good morning' when you wake up or see someone before lunch.

greetings.meaning: A greeting used from noon until evening
greetings.example: Good afternoon, teacher! Are we having art class today?
greetings.kid_friendly_explanation: Say 'good afternoon' after 12 o'clock until dinner time.

greetings.meaning: A greeting used in the evening
greetings.example: Good evening, Dad! What's for dinner?
greetings.kid_friendly_explanation: Say 'good evening' when the sun starts to go down.

greetings.example: Hi! Do you want to play with me?
greetings.kid_friendly_explanation: 'Hi' is a quick and happy way to say hello to a friend.

greetings.meaning: An informal greeting to get attention
greetings.example: Hey! Wait for me! I want to come too!
greetings.kid_friendly_explanation: Say 'hey' when you want a friend to look at you.

greetings.meaning: A question asking about someone's well-being
greetings.example: Hi Lily! How are you today? I hope you feel better.
greetings.kid_friendly_explanation: Ask 'how are you' to show you care about your friend.

greetings.meaning: A polite response to 'How are you?'
greetings.example: How are you? I'm fine, thank you. And you?
greetings.kid_friendly_explanation: Say this when someone asks how you feel and you feel good.

greetings.meaning: Said when meeting someone for the first time
greetings.example: Hello, I'm Tom. Nice to meet you! Do you want to be friends?
greetings.kid_friendly_explanation: Say 'nice to meet you' when you meet a new person.

greetings.meaning: A friendly way to say goodbye
greetings.example: I have to go home now. See you later, Alex!
greetings.kid_friendly_explanation: Say 'see you later' when you will see your friend again soon.

greetings.meaning: A word used when leaving someone
greetings.example: Goodbye, Grandma! I love you! I will visit again next week.
greetings.kid_friendly_explanation: Say 'goodbye' when you are leaving a place or person.

greetings.meaning: A casual way to say goodbye
greetings.example: Bye bye, puppy! Be a good dog!
greetings.kid_friendly_explanation: 'Bye bye' is a fun way to say goodbye to friends and family.

greetings.meaning: A kind goodbye wishing someone safety
greetings.example: Have fun at the park! Take care!
greetings.kid_friendly_explanation: Say 'take care' when you want your friend to be safe.

greetings.meaning: A greeting for someone who has arrived
greetings.example: Welcome to my birthday party! I have cake and games!
greetings.kid_friendly_explanation: Say 'welcome' when someone comes to your house or party.
